MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HOLLY HULBURD DESIGN INC AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN WEST WORLDWIDE EXPRESS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
